Brouwerij Noordt

Rotterdam

Brouwerij Noordt Rotterdam brewery serving laid-back craft beers with major chill vibes — perfect for beer lovers and crew hangs. Low-key spot near Zaagmolenkade where the brews and the vibe both slap.

Brouwerij Noordt is a Rotterdam brewery with easygoing energy and solid craft-beer cred — think approachable, flavour-forward pours and a relaxed crowd. It’s a great place to kick back with friends, taste local brews, and soak up mellow industrial-chic vibes without any pretense. Hit Noordt when you want a casual beer sesh or an intro to Dutch craft brewing; the spot is ideal for small groups, casual dates, or solo tasting sessions. Located on Zaagmolenkade, it’s easy to find via Maps and makes a solid stop on a Rotterdam brewery crawl.

Zaagmolenkade 46, 3035 KA Rotterdam, Netherlands
👯‍♀️Easygoing🍺Beer Lovers
